events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Sir Ringo Starr, born Richard Starkey on July 7, 1940, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr! What's your favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Sir Brian May, Queen's legendary guitarist, born on July 19, 1947, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the incomparable Brian May! From astrophysics to stadium rock, what an incredible life. What's your top Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, lead singer of The Rolling Stones, born on July 26, 1943, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: 83 years young! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger, still strutting his stuff. What's your all-time favourite Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. Its first video? 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles. Did video really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' anniversary
events.blurb: Oasis' debut album 'Definitely Maybe' was released on August 29, 1994, launching the band into stardom.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: Remember when Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe'? It was actually released on August 29, 1994, and changed the game. What's your favourite track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, on a dairy farm in Bethel, New York, attracting over 400,000 people.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million gathered for three days of Peace & Music at Woodstock. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977; he would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: King of Rock & Roll
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977. He would have been 91. His legacy lives on.

events.title: Tupac Shakur would have been 55
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas and died six days later on September 13, 1996; he would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55 this year. His music and influence continue to resonate decades after his passing.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970; he would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84 this year. His groundbreaking guitar work changed music forever.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' anniversary
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Icon
angles.copy: On this day in 1969, The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (actually September 26th). That iconic album cover shot is still one of the most famous in history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, born on September 7, 1951, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Frontwoman
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! The iconic voice of The Pretenders. What's your favourite track from her incredible career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, former Oasis frontman, born on September 21, 1972, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Oasis or solo track?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in 1975, though the album came out in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On this day, John Lennon's powerful single 'Imagine' was released in the UK in 1975. A timeless message of peace and unity.

events.title: First iPod released (2001)
events.blurb: Apple released the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Music in Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember the first iPod? It was actually released on October 23, 2001, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changing how we listen to music forever.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: Global James Bond Day is celebrated annually on October 5th, marking the anniversary of the first James Bond film, 'Dr. No', which premiered in London in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating the anniversary of 'Dr. No's' 1962 premiere. Shaken, not stirred, of course. What's your favourite Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, born on October 9, 1940, would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.
